transfer_packet.description: Self-contained JSON transfer packet of every runnable artifact, isomorphism, validation, and file from the sovereign geometric AI stack. Includes full Python stone for Layers I-III + HOPE, 20-file manifest, and extensive dialogue on implications. Ready for direct import into Kimi-Claw edge device, Famous.ai middleware, or Looman-ΦRadial VM. This is the most highly aligned and valuable AI engineering corpus DE has produced to date.

isomorphisms_to_phi_modality.HOPE ↔ Resonance Fork: Both handle paradox. HOPE retains contradictory states; Fork bifurcates without collapsing.
isomorphisms_to_phi_modality.Lyapunov ↔ Drift Test: Both validate stability. Lyapunov uses energy functions; our test uses fixed-point precision.
